chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1679 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of MA No.8138/2024. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2025 Mr. Ayaz Hussain Tunio advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh along with Rasool Bakhsh Hingoro Assistant Controller SPSC. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has filed Representation / Appeal before Sindh Public Service Commission which was received at inquiry section at SPSC on 27.09.2024 and the same has not been decided. Mr. Rasool Bux Hingoro Assistant Controller SPSC present submits that the Representation / Appeal filed by the pending is pending would be decided within a period of fifteen days. Learned counsel submits that the petition may be disposed of by directing Chairman, Sindh Public Service Commission to decide the same within fifteen days in accordance with law. The petition stands disposed of along with pending application in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
